topic: Lints - missing_docs and API Documentation Enforcement

turns.content: I'm trying to submit my first contribution to this library crate, but rustc is complaining about #![deny(missing_docs). I thought since my struct is private I could just ignore the lint entirely without adding any doc comments at all. Why isn't that working?

The error occurs because #![deny(missing_docs) applies to public items, not private ones unless you explicitly suppress it or use rustdoc --document-private-items on nightly. Think of it like a security guard at the front door who only checks guests entering; your private fields are inside the building and don't need that check until they become part of the public API. If you want to document everything regardless, you can enable rustdoc --document-private-items in your build script or use #[allow(missing_docs)] on specific items you're intentionally keeping undocumented for now.
